methodsAttempted.query: site:unisa.it ChatGPT OR intelligenza artificiale generativa studenti esami policy Universita degli Studi di Salerno
methodsAttempted.notes: Firecrawl was not available in this isolated worker. Public web search on official UNISA domains found course, research-project, public-engagement, and call/news pages; no central university-wide generative-AI student policy page was found.

methodsAttempted.query: site:web.unisa.it IA generativa OR intelligenza artificiale generativa
methodsAttempted.notes: Official-domain search found funded-project and public-engagement pages. Research/course pages were stronger evidence than event listings for staged claims.

Direct HTTP fetches were limited to public official URLs. https://web.unisa.it/robots.txt returned HTTP 403, so no disallowed path was identified from robots.txt and no restricted paths were accessed.
Direct HTTP fetch retrieved the public official teaching page for the course INTERNATIONAL LAW, CYBERSECURITY AND ETHICS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE.

artifacts.summary: Official-source discovery found AI-related teaching and research evidence on UNISA-controlled domains but did not find a central university-wide generative-AI policy. Claims are narrowly scoped to the official course and funded-project pages.

artifacts.sourceTitle: INTERNATIONAL LAW, CYBERSECURITY AND ETHICS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE

artifacts.claimText: University of Salerno has an official 2024/2025 course page for a master's course titled International Law, Cybersecurity and Ethics of Artificial Intelligence; the course objectives describe AI, cybersecurity, governance, data protection, and trustworthy AI topics. This is course-level teaching evidence, not a university-wide AI-use policy.

artifacts.sourceTitle: INTERNATIONAL LAW, CYBERSECURITY AND ETHICS OF ARTIFICIAL INTELLIGENCE
artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: IL CORSO MIRA A FORNIRE AGLI STUDENTI LE CONOSCENZE, LE COMPETENZE E I QUADRI CONCETTUALI NECESSARI PER AFFRONTARE LE DIMENSIONI GIURIDICHE, POLITICHE E SOCIALI DELLO SVILUPPO E DELL'IMPLEMENTAZIONE DEI SISTEMI DI CYBERSECURITY E INTELLIGENZA ARTIFICIALE (IA-AI), NEL DIRITTO INTERNAZIONALE ED EUROPEO, EVIDENZIANDO LE IMPLICAZIONI SUL PIANO ETICO.
artifacts.evidenceSnippetDisplay: The course aims to give students knowledge and conceptual frameworks for the legal, political, and social dimensions of cybersecurity and artificial-intelligence systems, with ethical implications.

artifacts.evidenceSnippetOriginal: INTELLIGENZA GENERATIVA E DIDATTICA UNIVERSITARIA DELLA MATEMATICA. Attivo. Gli obiettivi di questo progetto possono essere declinati nei punti seguenti, in continuità con la pluriennale attività di ricerca condotta dal responsabile di progetto ma fortemente attualizzati in considerazione dell'avanzare delle moderne tecnologie di Intelligenza Artificiale Generativa (IA Gen) con particolare riferimento alle esigenze didattiche peculiari dei CdS del DIEM.

artifacts.title: University of Salerno staged AI policy source review
artifacts.summary: Official UNISA discovery found course-level and funded-project evidence about AI ethics, cybersecurity, and generative AI in teaching. No central university-wide generative-AI policy was found in this staged crawl, so the approved claims are scoped to teaching/research source status.
limitations: This tracker is not legal advice, not academic integrity advice, and not an official university statement unless a linked source is the university's own official page.
This staged run does not identify a central university-wide generative-AI policy for students or staff.
